ai_processing.title: AI Processing Policy
ai_processing.flow_title: How your data flows through Pathly:
ai_processing.flow_1: You upload your CV or paste a job listing.
ai_processing.flow_2: Pathly automatically removes personal data (name, email, phone) and replaces them with internal placeholders.
ai_processing.flow_3: Only the anonymized text is sent to the AI. The AI never sees who you are.
ai_processing.flow_4: The AI generates suggestions (cover letters, CV optimization, coaching). You decide what to use.
ai_processing.flow_5: Pathly re-inserts your real data into the finished document. The final result contains your complete information.
ai_processing.flow_6: Anthropic deletes the anonymized request immediately after processing. No storage, no training.
ai_processing.s1_body: Pathly uses exclusively models from Anthropic (Claude) in the current version. Depending on the feature, different Claude variants are used. Additionally, Pathly uses Azure Document Intelligence (Microsoft, EU region) for reading PDF files and OpenAI Whisper for speech recognition in coaching.
ai_processing.s2_title: Data Protection Before Every AI Call (PII Sanitization)
ai_processing.s2_body:
Before your data leaves Pathly's infrastructure, it is automatically pseudonymized:
  • Your name is replaced with an internal placeholder
  • Your email is replaced with an internal placeholder
  • Your phone number is replaced with an internal placeholder
The AI receives only anonymized text and never sees your real contact information.

After AI processing, Pathly automatically re-inserts your real data into the finished document. The document you download or save is therefore complete and contains your real information. This data never leaves the European Supabase server where your account is stored.
ai_processing.s3_body:
Anonymized text data is sent via the Anthropic API (Enterprise agreement). The following guarantees apply according to Anthropic's Data Processing Agreement (DPA):
  • Anthropic does not train models on API data
  • Data is not stored and is deleted immediately after processing
  • Anthropic does not share data with third parties
  • Transmission uses TLS 1.3 encryption
ai_processing.s4_body:
• Anthropic API: Requests are deleted immediately after processing (0-day retention per Enterprise DPA)
  • Pathly Servers: Generated texts (cover letters, CV optimizations, video scripts) are stored in your account on European servers (Supabase, Frankfurt) until you delete them
  • Audit Trail: We log token usage and costs per AI call, but never the content of your documents
  • Account Deletion: When you delete your account, all data is permanently removed within 30 days
ai_processing.s5_body:
The AI provides suggestions only. You have full control at every step:
  • Cover Letters: You review and edit every text before downloading
  • CV Optimization: You see a preview and decide whether to adopt it
  • Coaching: The AI simulates a practice conversation. No automatic evaluation of you as a person
  • Job Analysis: The AI extracts facts from job postings. You decide whether to apply
There is no profiling and no automated decision with legal effect.
ai_processing.s6_body:
• Encryption: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest
  • Access Control: Row-Level Security (RLS) ensures only you can see your data
  • API Security Monitoring: All AI calls are monitored for security and availability. Rate limiting protects against abuse.
  • Data Residency: Supabase Frankfurt (eu-central-1), Azure Document Intelligence (EU West)
ai_processing.s7_body:
Under GDPR Art. 15-22 you have the right to:
  • Access: What data we have about you (data export in settings)
  • Deletion: Delete your account and all data (in settings)
  • Withdrawal: Revoke your AI consent at any time (in settings under Privacy)
  • Complaint: You can file a complaint with your local data protection authority
ai_processing.s8_body: For questions about AI processing, reach us at contact@path-ly.eu.

cookie_policy.title: Cookie Policy
cookie_policy.s1_body: We use only essential cookies required for authentication and security (Supabase Auth). These cannot be disabled.
cookie_policy.s2_body: For this version of Pathly, we do not use third-party tracking cookies (like Google Analytics).

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: Pathly is an automated job application assistant. We provide tools to help you manage and expedite your job search.
terms.s2_body: You agree to provide accurate information and not to misuse the service for spamming or illegal activities.
terms.s3_body: Pathly provides suggestions and automation but does not guarantee job offers. We are not liable for the outcome of your applications.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.tldr_1: We only store data necessary for creating your job applications.
privacy.tldr_2: Your data is stored encrypted in the EU (Frankfurt). AI calls go to US providers — covered by Zero Data Retention.
privacy.tldr_3: We don't sell your data. We don't use it for AI training.
privacy.tldr_4: You can export or delete your data at any time.
privacy.tldr_5: AI-generated texts are labelled as such — you review before submitting.
privacy.s1_intro: Responsible for data processing under the GDPR:
privacy.s2_intro: We only collect data necessary to operate Pathly:
privacy.s3_b_text: Processing your data to provide Pathly services (document generation, job matching).
privacy.s3_a_text: You provide explicit consent for AI processing of your data during onboarding.
privacy.s4_intro: We only share your data with the following service providers, contractually bound to GDPR compliance:
privacy.s4_anthropic_purpose: AI text generation (cover letters, CV analysis, coaching)
privacy.s4_scc_note: For US-based providers, EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) serve as the legal basis for data transfer. Anthropic and OpenAI operate under Zero Data Retention (ZDR) — your data is not stored and not used for training. Direct identifiers (names, emails, phone numbers) are technically pseudonymized before transmission to US services. Document extraction (Azure) takes place exclusively in the EU — no third-country transfer.
privacy.s5_notice_title: Transparency Notice per EU AI Act
privacy.s5_notice_body: Pathly uses Artificial Intelligence to generate cover letters and analyze CVs. All AI-generated texts are labelled as such.
privacy.s5_no_training_text: We and our AI partners (Anthropic, OpenAI) do not use your personal data or CVs to train AI models. API usage is configured to exclude training on user data (Zero Data Retention).
privacy.s5_human_text: AI-generated content may contain errors. You are responsible for reviewing all generated applications before submitting. Pathly never submits an application automatically — you always stay in control.
privacy.s5_docs_text: CVs are extracted by Azure Document Intelligence (EU, West Europe) — no US transfer for this step. CV content is pseudonymized before being sent to Claude for optimization; personal contact details are replaced with placeholders.
privacy.s5_coaching_text: In AI coaching, your messages are pseudonymized before being sent to the language model. Names, email addresses, and phone numbers are replaced with placeholders. The original chat history is stored only in your session.
privacy.s6_account_text: As long as your account exists.
privacy.s6_docs_text: As long as your account exists. Upon account deletion, all documents are irrevocably deleted within 30 days.
privacy.s6_jobs_text: As long as your account exists.
privacy.s6_ai_text: 90 days after creation (for quality assurance). Automatically deleted afterwards.
privacy.s6_coaching_text: Chat history is anonymized after 90 days. The session is fully deleted after 180 days.
privacy.s6_consent_text: Retained for legal reasons (GDPR Art. 7) for 3 years, even after account deletion.
privacy.s7_encryption_text: All data is encrypted at rest with AES-256. Transmission uses TLS 1.3 exclusively.
privacy.s7_rls_text: Row Level Security (RLS) ensures each user can only see their own data.
privacy.s7_location_text: All primary data is stored in the EU (AWS Frankfurt, eu-central-1). AI API calls to Anthropic and OpenAI go to US servers, but with Zero Data Retention — no storage, no training.
privacy.s7_pii_text: Before every AI call, direct identifiers (name, email, phone, address) are replaced with placeholders. The AI never sees your real personal data.
privacy.s8_intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.s8_r15_text: You can request information about your stored data at any time.
privacy.s8_r16_text: You can correct incorrect data in your settings.
privacy.s8_r17_text: You can request deletion of your account and all associated data.
privacy.s8_r18_text: You can request restriction of processing of your data.
privacy.s8_r20_text: You can export your data in a machine-readable format (JSON).
privacy.s8_r21_text: You can object to the processing of your data at any time.
privacy.s8_r7_text: You can withdraw your consent for AI processing at any time.
privacy.s8_contact: To exercise your rights, contact us at: contact@path-ly.eu
privacy.s9_title: 9. Right to Complain to a Supervisory Authority
privacy.s9_body: You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates the GDPR. The competent authority depends on your place of residence or the seat of the controller.
privacy.s10_body: Pathly uses only technically necessary cookies for authentication and session management. No tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies are used. Therefore, no cookie banner is required.
privacy.s11_body: For material changes to this privacy policy, you will be notified by email or in-app notification and may be asked for renewed consent. The current version is always available at /legal/privacy-policy.
privacy.s4_posthog_data: Page views, feature usage (no PII, masked inputs)
privacy.s4_sentry_data: Error messages, stack traces (PII removed via beforeSend)
privacy.s4_inngest_purpose: Background jobs (CV analysis, cover letter generation)
privacy.s4_inngest_data: Job IDs, user IDs (no content data)
privacy.s4_upstash_data: User IDs as hash (no content data)

volunteering.t1_text: At Berliner Tafel I learned that giving and receiving is not a one-way street. The gratitude of the people moved me deeply.
volunteering.t2_text: When a child speaks their first full sentence and beams with joy — that is a moment you never forget.
volunteering.t3_text: I realized: when I help others, I also help myself. Volunteering was my anchor during an uncertain time.
volunteering.t4_text: At the animal shelter I learned to take responsibility again. Animals don’t judge — they simply need you.

cv_optimizer.opt_step_4: Integrating keywords from the job posting
cv_optimizer.error_no_match: No CV match result found. Please complete the CV match step first.
cv_optimizer.error_timeout: The optimization took too long (>110 sec). Please try again — the AI is sometimes slower with large CVs.
cv_optimizer.error_missing_params: Missing required data. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.error_ai_failed: AI processing failed. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.error_parse_failed: AI response could not be processed. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.error_validation_failed: AI output did not pass validation. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.error_db_failed: Could not save results. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.no_cv_desc: Please upload and scan your initial CV first before optimizing it.
cv_optimizer.no_cv_scan_hint: 💡 Tip: Uploading alone is not enough. Go to Settings → CV → Upload. The scan starts automatically after upload.
cv_optimizer.main_desc: We compare your <cv>CV</cv> with the <matchResults>match results</matchResults> and give you <suggestions>targeted suggestions</suggestions> on which phrases will lead to <moreSuccess>more success</moreSuccess>.
cv_optimizer.metrics_desc: CVs with metrics achieve significantly better ATS scores. Assign numbers directly to your positions — the AI will integrate them into the matching bullet points.
cv_optimizer.qr_intro: Before we generate your personal QR code, here's a quick overview of why this step is worth it:
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_1_desc: A short video gives recruiters a more authentic picture of you than plain text. You show who you are.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_2_desc: You immediately stand out from the crowd. Experience shows that personal video messages can increase the chance of an interview by up to 40%.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_3_desc: Your video is securely hosted on EU servers (AWS Frankfurt). Recruiters can only watch the video (stream) — downloading or saving is technically blocked.
cv_optimizer.qr_benefit_4_desc: You don't need to worry about anything. After exactly 14 days, your video will be completely and irreversibly deleted.
cv_optimizer.tech_ats_warning_body: The "Valley" template is optimised for ATS systems: its single-column layout is read flawlessly top-to-bottom. The "Tech" template looks great visually, but its two-column design and graphic elements (coloured skill badges, arrow bullets) are frequently misread or ignored by ATS parsers.
cv_optimizer.tech_ats_warning_dismiss: Do not show this warning again
cv_optimizer.error_pdf_download: PDF could not be created. Please try again.
cv_optimizer.btn_layout_fix_desc: If the title and summary take up too much space.
cv_optimizer.error_free_retry_exhausted: The free correction has already been used.
cv_optimizer.preview_tour_body: If your CV has too much white space or sections look off, click "Fix Formatting". Pathly automatically corrects the layout. Free and one-time per job.

diff_review.confirm_none_reviewed_desc: You haven’t reviewed any individual change yet. Would you like to accept all suggestions automatically, or take a moment to review them?
diff_review.change_limit_info: We focus on the most impactful changes (max. 12) to keep your CV at 2 pages. Stations without suggestions are already well positioned.
diff_review.ats_modal_station_label: Which station does this relate to?
diff_review.ats_modal_input_placeholder: e.g. "Tracked leads with HubSpot, built sales reporting"

cv_match.title: CV Match & Optimization
cv_match.subtitle: We compare your CV with the requirements of this position. You'll receive a comparison to generate an optimized CV.
cv_match.ats_desc: Usually, the first to review your CV is an algorithm. Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) specifically look for keywords relevant to the position. If these terms are missing, your application is often automatically filtered out. We recommend integrating the keywords from the job posting directly into your CV.
cv_match.no_cv_desc: To start CV Match, you need to upload your CV first. It only takes 30 seconds.
cv_match.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
cv_match.error_parse: Server responded incorrectly (HTML instead of JSON). Please reload the page.
cv_match.card_empty_hint: Click a satellite to view details
cv_match.card_not_analyzed: No requirements were analyzed for this category
cv_match.btn_reanalyze_tooltip: Run a fresh analysis with your current CV (uses 0.5 credits)

documents_required.cv_desc: To use this feature, we need your CV. Uploading takes only 30 seconds.
documents_required.cover_letter_desc: To create personalized cover letters, we need a sample cover letter from you.
documents_required.both_desc: Please upload your CV and a cover letter so we can help you optimally.

cv_select.title: Select CV
cv_select.desc: You have multiple CVs uploaded. Which one would you like to use for this analysis?

cover_letter.error_step2: Please select at least one station (step 2).
cover_letter.analysis_desc: To make your cover letter as personalized as possible, we analyze the vision, milestones, current projects and growth of {company}.
cover_letter.website_hint: The website is needed for the analysis. It will be saved for future steps.
cover_letter.alert_analysis_failed: Analysis failed. Please check the website URL and try again.
cover_letter.results_desc: To stand out from the crowd, we recommend a personalized opening. Choose an aspect of the company that resonates with you.
cover_letter.manual_placeholder: Describe your personal interest in the position or a specific aspect of the company...
cover_letter.quote_desc: We also recommend integrating a quote. It always makes a great impression :)
cover_letter.quote_searching_desc: AI is searching for matching thought leaders and quotes...
cover_letter.quote_example_title: How a quote works in a cover letter:
cover_letter.quote_example_intro: I would like to share a quote with you, as it reminded me of your principle of 'Challenging the Status Quo':
cover_letter.quote_example_quote: 'The most dangerous phrase is: We have always done it this way.'
cover_letter.quote_example_outro: This quote by Grace Hopper has shaped my thinking since my time at Deutsche Telekom. It reminds me daily to stay curious and to keep moving forward together.
cover_letter.intro_focus_title: Which anchor should open the introduction?
cover_letter.intro_focus_desc: To avoid overloading the cover letter, only ONE element gets the introduction.
cover_letter.intro_focus_desc_bold: The other is elegantly woven into the main body.
cover_letter.focus_quote_desc: — News supports a CV station in the main body
cover_letter.focus_quote_desc_no_hook: — The quote opens the cover letter
cover_letter.focus_hook_desc: — Quote supports a CV station in the main body
cover_letter.focus_hook_desc_no_hook: — Introduction begins with a company reference
cover_letter.pingpong_desc: Instead of just agreeing with the quote, Claude builds a critical counter-perspective — thesis, antithesis, synthesis.
cover_letter.pingpong_disabled_desc: Ping-pong is only available when the quote appears in the introduction. Select 'Quote in the introduction' to enable this option.
cover_letter.stations_desc: Select up to 3 stations that best demonstrate your fit for the position.
cover_letter.stations_empty_desc: No CV uploaded. You can still continue.
cover_letter.context_label: What was particularly relevant about this role for this position? (optional, max. 2 sentences)
cover_letter.context_placeholder: e.g. This is where I learned how to manage complex stakeholder processes...
cover_letter.recommendation_match: Match: Based on the job description and your background, this station is an excellent fit.
cover_letter.doc_desc: The AI calibrates itself to the tone of this cover letter — sentence length, conjunctions and rhetorical devices are adopted.
cover_letter.doc_not_analyzed: This cover letter has not been analyzed yet. The AI will use the default tone.
cover_letter.doc_modal_title: Which cover letter as tone template?
cover_letter.doc_upload_hint: Upload a cover letter in Settings
cover_letter.tone_data_driven_preview: I was able to increase revenue in the B2B segment by 15% — through systematic optimization of sales processes.
cover_letter.tone_storytelling_preview: When I first saw the challenges in B2B sales, I knew: this is where I can truly make a difference.
cover_letter.tone_formal_preview: My career has been shaped by successful closings in strategic sales.
cover_letter.tone_philosophisch_preview: Growth happens where established processes are questioned and reimagined.
cover_letter.style_analyzed_info: Your personal writing style has been analyzed. The AI uses sentence length and conjunctions from it, while the tone comes from the selected preset.
cover_letter.style_missing_info: Upload an old cover letter in Settings so the AI can learn your style. Until then, we use the selected tone.
cover_letter.first90_desc: AI generates a concrete 3-point plan for your first 90 days — based on real company challenges.
cover_letter.first90_formal_desc: With formal style, additional paragraphs are omitted to maintain the classic 4-paragraph structure.
cover_letter.vul_desc: Adds 1-2 strategic, authentic learning curves — shows self-confidence and growth.
cover_letter.vul_formal_desc: Formal style requires a consistently confident tone without strategic weaknesses.
cover_letter.error_not_logged_in: Not logged in. Please sign in.
cover_letter.critique_unavailable: Simulation not available. You can still edit your cover letter manually.
cover_letter.critique_resolved_desc: The hiring manager's critique has been successfully incorporated.
cover_letter.editor_manual_hint: Click any paragraph to edit it manually

video_letter.consent_description: We'll create Talking Points so you know what to say in your 1-minute video. The video is available for 14 days and is then automatically deleted.
video_letter.step1_title: How do you want to come across?
video_letter.step1_subtitle: Choose the style that suits you best.
video_letter.archetype_builder_desc: I show results & things I've built
video_letter.archetype_specialist_desc: I show depth in my field
video_letter.step2_title: How direct should your style be?
video_letter.step2_subtitle: Every style is professional — you just choose the level.
video_letter.tone_standard_snippet: I'm a candidate with X years of experience in...
video_letter.tone_direct_snippet: In 3 years I delivered X. That's what I bring to you.
video_letter.tone_initiative_snippet: I've analyzed your approach and have 3 concrete ideas — 20 min call?
video_letter.editor_overwrite_banner: You already have an edited script. Overwrite with new AI suggestions?
video_letter.sidebar_tooltip_mirror: Use this language in the video — recruiters will hear it.
video_letter.preview_empty_teleprompter: Write text in your blocks to see the teleprompter preview
video_letter.record_camera_denied: Camera access was denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
video_letter.record_camera_unsupported: Your browser does not support video recording. Please use Chrome or Firefox.
video_letter.done_description: Your video is accessible via the QR code on your CV.
video_letter.done_live_badge: Video is LIVE -- recruiters can view it now
video_letter.done_preview_hint: This link is the same as the QR code on your CV.
video_letter.done_monitor_privacy: We count anonymous page views. No name or IP address of the recruiter is stored.
video_letter.done_auto_delete_suffix: The video will be irreversibly deleted.
video_letter.done_delete_confirm_body: The QR code on your CV stays active. Hiring managers will see 'Video is being prepared' until you record a new one.
video_letter.upload_privacy_body: Your video will be encrypted and stored on EU servers (Supabase, Frankfurt). It will NOT be used for AI training. After 14 days, the file is automatically and irreversibly deleted.

feedback_voice.title: Was denkst du?
feedback_voice.success_message: Thanks, {name}. I'll take a look right away.
feedback_voice.question_1: What do you like most about Pathly?
feedback_voice.question_2: What frustrates you or what is still missing?
feedback_voice.question_3: Do you have a tip I should act on immediately?
feedback_voice.error_rate_limit: You've sent multiple feedbacks recently. Please wait a few minutes.
feedback_voice.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

mood.today_message_1: I know today feels tough. But let's get one Pomodoro done!
mood.today_message_2: Not your best day — but one step counts. One Pomodoro is enough.
mood.today_message_3: Solid day. Let's go for two Pomodoros.
mood.today_message_4: Good energy today! Three Pomodoros are doable.
mood.today_message_5: You're at your best! Five Pomodoros — let's go!
mood.auto_hidden: Check-in hidden. Re-enable in Settings → Personal.
mood.checkin_reactivate_desc: Check-in was hidden after skipping 5 times.

upload.eu_privacy_note: Your data is extracted and processed GDPR-compliantly on EU servers.
upload.cv_hint_title: A quick note about your CV
upload.cv_hint_description: To optimize your CV, we need 2-3 bullet points per position.
upload.cv_hint_bullet_2: Analyzed qualitative data and created action recommendations
upload.cv_hint_bullet_3: Reduced error rate by 34% through iterative prototyping
upload.cl_hint_title: A quick note about your cover letter
upload.cl_hint_description: Upload your best cover letter, the one that sounds most like you. Pathly uses it to learn your voice, style, and structure, then mirrors it in every new letter it generates.
upload.cl_hint_bullet_1: The cover letter you're most proud of
upload.cl_hint_bullet_2: The one that sounds most authentic — not the most polished
upload.cl_hint_bullet_3: Ideally one written for a role you genuinely wanted

tour.step1_body: A study by Dr. Gail Matthews shows: People who write down their goals and share progress achieve them 33 to 42 percent more often. Pathly invites you to set your goals for today. Type directly or use drag and drop.
tour.step2_body: Create your own tasks or use Pathly recommendations from your job queue. Coaching recommendations appear automatically when we identify learning areas after an interview. Simply drag tasks into the calendar.
tour.step3_body: At Pathly we love working with the Pomodoro Technique. Focused work blocks with short breaks. It is the fastest way to make progress. Ready to start?
tour.cv_preview_format_body: If your CV has too much whitespace or sections appear misaligned, click "Fix Formatting". Pathly will automatically fix the layout. Free, once per job.

job_queue.empty_step1_body: Here you manage all roles you want to track. Pathly analyses each role automatically. You can work on up to 5 active jobs at a time. Click the button to get started.
job_queue.step1_body: Here you see all the roles you are currently working on. Every role follows the same process from analysis to the finished cover letter. You decide every step yourself and stay in full control at all times.
job_queue.step2_body: The profile shows you everything Pathly found out about the role. Most important are the ATS keywords. These terms are scanned by applicant systems and often determine whether you get invited.
job_queue.step3_body: Pathly compares your profile against the requirements and shows your strengths and gaps. We use this match to tailor your CV and cover letter precisely to the role.
job_queue.step4_body: Here you can add missing ATS keywords using the plus button. Pathly weaves them in naturally. You also generate your QR Video Letter here. It gets printed onto your CV and increases callback rates by 20 to 38 percent.
job_queue.step5_body: The cover letter is written based on your optimizations and your personal writing style. Pathly analyses the company in real time. Before sending Pathly simulates the critique of a real Hiring Manager.

job_search.empty_step1_title: Search for roles or for missions
job_search.empty_step1_body: Enter a job title, a keyword or filter by sustainability. Pathly searches the market for you and saves the results.
job_search.step1_title: Search for roles or for missions
job_search.step1_body: Enter a job title, a keyword or filter by sustainability. Pathly searches the market for you and saves the results.
job_search.step2_title: Review first, then add to queue
job_search.step2_body: If you like a role, add it to the queue. Pathly shows you a preview first: tasks and qualifications you can adjust before the job enters analysis. With your input we get the optimal data.

coaching.empty_step1_body: Coaching analyzes your CV against a real role: tasks, gaps, questions. Add a job to the queue first, then come back.
coaching.step1_body: Click here to start a mock session. First choose the round: Introduction, Deep Dive or Case Study. Then the number of questions. The AI takes the recruiter role and analyzes your answers live.
coaching.step2_body: Click a row: you see the profile card of the role, your past rounds and concrete recommendations for your knowledge gaps. Example: for Zeb Consulting, Java, SQL and OpenStack are missing. These get added as suggestions directly to your daily goals.

ai_badge.tooltip_generated: This content was created with the help of AI. Review it carefully before use.
ai_badge.tooltip_optimized: This CV was optimized by AI. Review all changes before submitting.
ai_badge.tooltip_researched: This information was researched by AI. Facts may be inaccurate — please verify.
ai_badge.tooltip_coach: You're practicing with an AI coach. Questions and feedback are AI-generated.
ai_badge.tooltip_recommendation: This recommendation is based on AI analysis. Review it critically in the context of your situation.

reconsent_banner.title: Updated privacy notice for AI processing
reconsent_banner.body: We've updated our notice regarding the processing of special data categories (e.g. photos in your CV). Your PII protection remains fully active.

admin.title: Founder OS
admin.delete_all_data: All data (jobs, documents, credits) will also be removed.

security.hero_tagline: Your data protection is not an afterthought — it's the architecture.
security.dsgvo_item_encryption_sub: All data is stored encrypted with AES-256.
security.dsgvo_item_encryption_detail: Your data is encrypted on Supabase servers in Frankfurt (eu-central-1). Even in case of a server breach, the data would be unreadable without the encryption key.
security.dsgvo_item_pii_sub: Your name is separated from your data before AI processing.
security.dsgvo_item_pii_detail: Personal data (name, address, contact details) is replaced with placeholders before AI processing. The AI only sees the content, not your identity.
security.dsgvo_item_erasure_sub: You can request complete deletion of all your data at any time.
security.dsgvo_item_erasure_detail: All data (CV, cover letters, job queue, application history) is deleted immediately. Consent records are retained for 3 years (Art. 7 GDPR evidence preservation).
security.dsgvo_item_tls_sub: All data transfers are encrypted with TLS 1.3.
security.dsgvo_item_tls_detail: Every connection between your browser and our servers is protected with TLS 1.3. This also applies to all API calls to third parties like Anthropic and OpenAI.
security.dsgvo_item_rls_sub: Each user can only see their own data.
security.dsgvo_item_rls_detail: PostgreSQL Row Level Security (RLS) enforces at the database level that every query only returns data belonging to the authenticated user. This is not an application feature — it's a technical guarantee.
security.nis2_item_incident_sub: We proactively report security incidents. You will be informed as an affected person.
security.nis2_item_incident_detail: Aligned with NIS2 Art. 23: Early warning within 24h, full report within 72h. As an affected person, you will be informed about the nature and scope of the incident.
security.nis2_item_audit_sub: 3 active audit trails: consents, credits, and AI usage.
security.nis2_item_audit_detail: consent_history stores all consents (3-year retention). credit_events documents every transaction. generation_logs records AI calls with model, tokens, and timestamp.
security.nis2_item_supply_sub: Zero Data Retention with Anthropic and OpenAI. Your data does not train any AI models.
security.nis2_item_supply_detail: All AI partners are contractually bound not to use data for model training (Zero Data Retention). All API calls run over encrypted connections (TLS 1.3).
security.vendors_subtitle: Art. 30 GDPR Record of Processing Activities · As of 04/2026
security.rights_export_sub: Download all stored data (JSON) — Art. 20 GDPR
security.rights_delete_notice: Consent records (Art. 7 GDPR) are retained for 3 years.
security.consent_art15_hint: All consents are included in your data export (Art. 20 GDPR).
security.delete_modal_warning_body: All your data will be irrevocably deleted: CV, cover letters, job queue, application history, coaching sessions, and Stripe subscription.
security.delete_modal_retention_notice: Consent records (consent_history) will be retained for 3 years per Art. 7 GDPR.
